data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for verification status at the request-item level.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of verification status at the request-item level, but the evidence provided does not include any verification rows or related metadata. While there are multiple passed steps indicating various functionalities, none of them directly address the need for verification status, leading to an inconclusive result. The prior step evidence indicates a gap in the current implementation regarding the specified requirement.
gaps: Missing verification rows with verifier biz/provider metadata.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
